stem: The function w(t) = 480 - 6t models the volume of liquid, in milliliters, in a container t seconds after it begins draining from a hole at the bottom. According to the model, what is the predicted volume, in milliliters, draining from the container each second?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The slope -6 indicates that the volume decreases by 6 milliliters each second, so the rate of drainage is 6 mL per second. Choice A is the initial volume. Choice C is the volume after 1 second (480 - 6). Choice D is the time it takes to fully drain (480/6 = 80 seconds).
